items.text:
Taurus rising, with pisces venus 11h - virgo nn 5h, aries saturn 12h.. Lost job in August 25, I don't work til now lol but I'm happy to do my slow morning 🤣 lost my friend, because we don't have mutual interest - what I mean by that = I was only the one who carrying the relationship.. And I'm tired..
My dream ? slow living near nature with unlimited money resources 🤣 another dream is I like to build a place for abandoned/ stray animals - so they have a good life 🙂
taurus rising 12th horse Venus in Scorpio 6th house and descendant, and north node in libra 6th house

♉️⬆️, NN in Aries 12H, Saturn in Sagittarius in 8H. Been going through it daily. Contract completed in February and no work since. Confronted family about not showing up for me. They are not happy. Dreams would be to continue my career but more solo / freelance. I want to be able to work anywhere. I want cats in my life again. I want to help others but I’m not there yet. I’ll get there. I constantly attract people who are going through things I’ve been through before. I’m typically the cheerleader and the one to help them through. I want romance, travel to Asia and New Zealand one day (hobbit land 😂). I want peace and balance. Creativity. Art. People who see me.

Venus in 12th house Aries (with mars and Lilith), north node in Taurus (12th house side), Saturn in 6th house Scorpio (with Pluto)… dreams: entrepreneur, van life, debt free, financial stability… my whole adult life I’ve been low income and contract life I’ve always had multiple jobs at once more work seems to be put on me but not much financial gain

0 degrees Taurus rising. Aries Venus (12h), Gemini Saturn (2h) and Gemini NN (2h). Found out my boyfriend of 2 years has been misleading me and hiding an addic*on from me while I was planning on moving in. I want the world to stop and time to breathe. I tend to attract people and lessons where I ignore my intuition because I care so deeply. Rough year.

Venus in Aquarius 10th house, north node in Leo 4th house and Saturn in Taurus first house. I just want to have stability. A nice home, reliable car, good friends, and a job that I enjoy going to. Currently in pursuit of being an elementary art teacher.

Taurus stelli Moon, NN, sec 1h, Venus Saturn Pluto stelli in Scorpio 7h. my dreams are legacy level community building, a good forest with a plaque commemorating me, my own house bad a better car/. ASIC needs never have to worry about. my weakness is intimate relationships and I've attracted lessons with men all my life and finally that's closed. if you want to chat w me, I can give you a heck of a story following my astrology patterns.

Venus Scorpio 7th, nn sag 8th, Saturn Aquarius 11th. In a state or anhedonia but showing up more authentically than I ever have 🤷‍♀️I feel like I’ve done enough and seen enough so I’m about to retire and paint on the coast somewhere
Taurus sun rising Venus 1h. Scorpio moon 6h: Pluto 8h Capricorn…

Venus in Aries 12th house, north node in Sagittarius 7th house and Saturn in Aquarius in 11th house - I use placidus instead of whole sign. I have no friends, haven’t for years, it’s very lonely and isolating, I have a fully thought out self execution plan if it ever gets that bad. I don’t have any real dreams anymore, but I’d like to be more spiritually connected. I attract people that trigger my self worth, self love and self respect
Taurus rising 🙋‍♀️I lost 2 jobs recently within one month (for reasons out of my control!). Venus in Libra (6h) Saturn in Scorpio (6h) N. Node in Gemini (2h).

Taurus rising, NN Pisces in 11th house, Cap Saturn 9th house, Venus Sagittarius 8th house. I just want to travel the world, have several homes in diff places, a nice spiritual community with kindred spirits,
Wait so tell us what’s the pattern ???
Taurus rising here. Venus in Sagittarius 7th house, Saturn in Pisces 11th house, and North node in Scorpio, retrograde 6th house
Am a Taurus rising with Venus in Aquarius my 10th house Saturn in libra in my 6th house north node in Sagittarius in my 8th house and I would want to travel all around the world
Oh boy.. Venus & North Node in Aries 12th, Saturn in Sagittarius 8th. I’ve only just recently learned that I’m allowed to have desires 🫠

Hi! Venus is in Leo. Saturn is in Aquarius. N Node in Capricorn. My dream is to make money through sharing my life on social media. I love travel, learning about new cultures and languages, and I’m very much a foodie. I like to inspire others with a good word of encouragement.

Venus in Gemini 2H. NN in Taurus 1H. Saturn in Scorpio 7H. I want to be able to take vacations, have my own cozy home, have some financial freedom, and be at peace. I have attracted low expression people, controllers, abusers, users, etc.
I've been going THROUGH IT since 2018. Abuse, divorce, losing 2 jobs, losing house, car accident, and another narcissistic relationship. I do feel I'm shifting up finally, though

I have my Venus and Saturn conjunct my sun in Aries 12H and my north node in in Virgo 5th house. My biggest dreams are to become a renowned writer performer and entertainer and use that money to help and include my entire family and friends so I know everyone is set for life long happiness. Also to open a nonprofit in my state that connects students with international students like a foreign exchange book club and at the end of the year you get to visit the place/person you’ve been studying and connecting with. Also I’d like to live near a waterfall and design my home to be structured in the environment around it. I feel like I’m always attracting lessons about drive and responsibility and self worth and love.

Venus in Aries in my 12th house. NN in Taurus 1st house. Saturn in Scorpio in my 7th house. literally gonna be my 1st night being homeless. Last couple of years have been brutal. Divorced, went thru all my savings im going thru 2 legal battles. lost my job of 13+ years ...Basically lost everything i found stable. I feel like i attract alot of chaos as of lately.

Definitely been going through it 😅 Virgo Venus in the 4th house, North Node in Virgo also in the 4th, Taurus Saturn in the 12th. And honestly, financial stability would be the biggest dream atm. I’ve attracted experiences that have taught me to trust myself more, and to realize not everyone is capable of caring for other people the way they should 😅

Venus in 1st, north node 12th, saturn 12th. Dream right now…after the last decade…peace, solitude, focus on creativity rooted in stability. I attract people who need me for emotional regulation. It’s exhausting.

Okay thanks because I think we’re under represented. I’ve never been a a real relationship as an adult(never engaged, never had a boyfriend or girlfriend, and havent really had s x in 6 years and before that it was kind of difficult too, and I’m 30), I have a sand like grasp on any male figure in my life(they die or go away), and women torture me. I worked really hard in a 20s to start my own business(working 2-3 jobs at a time and providing care for adults(not professionally I did too much for my roommates who I thought were my friends) lost everything and have not been able to grow anything back, I’ve been in and out of the ER, my “friends” turned their backs on me and literally used, abused, and abandoned me so I now have no friends, and I’ve never gotten along with my mother(she neglected and abused me) and adult women have hated me since I was 7(my2nd grade picked on me and female teachers did until I was graduating hs and then just out in the world some women(strangers) automatically dont like me and treat me weird. I’ve been abused at work. I’ve never fit in anywhere. I have Taurus rising, virgo venus in the 5th(with my sun), saturn in pisces in the 11th, and libra north node in the 6th(with my moon mercury and mars). I used to want to be in entertainment but I started tripping and loosing hope when my 20s were ending(I wanted to do comedy and leak into other things like edutainment or events) and before the pandemic I was starting a business and still want to do businesses like in food and convenience(but again Im losing hope). If I could be or have anything rn; I’d like to live comfortably. live to where I can eat whatever I want whenever any restaurant anywhere, travel when and where I want, sleep in a nice bed. I’ve struggled with the idea of want tbh(i’ve spent a lit of time suppressing the idea of want to make existing easier for me.) but I imagine in my fantasies I imagine building a crazy nice house somewhere quite, me being in the underground spa I imagined, and again eating whatever I want(i love food). Also I love fun so I want to move my body and not be tired. I think I learned I cant trust anyone lol
venus in Gemini 3rd house. North node leo & Saturn leo 5th
Cap Venus 9th house , Aries Saturn 12H , Leo NN 5th house
Taurus rising, Venus in the 11th/pisces, nn in 9th/Cap, Saturn in 11th/aqua. Yeah. It’s been bad since October last year.

Venus in Sagittarius 8th house, Virgo NN in 5th house, Saturn in Aries in 12th house: I hate working, but my passion is helping people and doing humanitarian work, I want a Chanel flap bag, Range Rover, and luxury 2 story loft apartment in dc

I’m a Taurus rising. 10th house Aquarius Venus. 11th house Aquarius North Node. 9th house Saturn in Capricorn. The vision I have for my life is to be a well respected public speaker and visionary creative director for major brands. I feel like I have attracted experiences that have allowed me to be authentic, resilient, and fearless. As a result, I’ve learned to quit things QUICKLY. I’ve lost a lot in the last 4 to 5 years—the passing of my mother and nephew being the biggest. I feel like my identity went through total demolition with Uranus coming through like a huge wrecking ball in my 1st house of self. I have an extremely high self-concept. However, if people were assessing my value based on the amount of people and things I’ve lost this past 5 years—they would have their own analysis. Not that I give a damn as to which conclusion they may have personally drawn.

Venus in taurus in the 12h Saturn in the 11h NN in the 6th. My mom just passed away a month ago so I’ve been dealing with the loss and grief from that. My dream is to just be free to travel and experience the world and different cultures and get paid to offer experiences. I feel like I attract people that need help a lot. Whether that’s healing emotional wounds or need someone to carry them through life which I don’t do anymore.

venus conjunct the sun both at 25 degrees 5th house placidus or 4th house whole sign, nn 29 degrees libra 6th house both house systems and saturn retrograde in pisces 11th house both house systems- ive lost my dad my job 4 times, losing love, losing friendships and my dreams are prophecies they always come true hot addition I have pluto in scorpio 7th house and jupiter in sagittarius 7th house or 8th house whole sign
Venus & NN in 11th Pisces. Saturn in Sag 8th. Dream to travel with freedom and flexibility.
I’m a Taurus rising working my tail off and I haven’t had water at my house that I’m renting in 2 weeks because I can’t afford it. Saturn in Scorpio 6th, Venus in 7th house

taurus rising. im chillin. venus is in my 5th house in Leo, saturn in 5th house leo and north node in scorpio in 7th house. I dont have any dreams or aspirations. just saying fk it and enjoying whatever time I have left. I haven't worked in 22 years because I was a stay at home mom but we have been seperated for 5 years. life is good. i cant complain.

7h Scorpio Venus
10h Aquarius North Node
9h Capricorn Saturn
Dreams: Live a fulfilling relaxing type of life. Be whatever I want, do whatever I want and have the best of everything.
Lessons: Letting go of ideas, people ect. Choosing myself over situations that aren't good for me anymore. Willingness to pivot.
2h gemini venus, 1h taurus north node & 3h cancer saturn
taurus rising that is fighting for my life lol i have a capricorn venus in the 9th house, north node in virgo in the 5th and saturn in aries 12th house

Venus in Leo 4th, Saturn in Leo 4th, and NN in Scorpio 7th. As a graphic designer with an MFA in that discipline, I work in this field currently - would love it to be more lucrative than it has been. I’d love to travel more as I’m a student of life and experience is the best teacher. Would love to lean into my NN by continuing to evolve (moon and Uranus live in the same sign and house as NN). 🤷🏼‍♀️Oh and I’ve attracted a lot of lessons in trust - by way of giving my trust and having it broken over and over. And when partnering (in anything business, relationships, friendships), to be as discerning as possible and remain objective as long as possible.
Venus/Mars/Sun 3rd cancer, north node Saturn Chiron Aries 12th. Lots of loss, I have stories. Almost everyone gone. My life is a lesson for me and others.

I’ve been going through it my whole life but but my Saturn is in 1st, Venus and NN in 3h. I dream about finding where I belong, falling in love, and feeling like my life has fallen into place. And I attract insane stuff in my life: near death experiences, medical events, crazy people, etc.

Pisces Venus in 11th, Pisces North node also in 11th (retrograde), Leo Saturn in 4th also retrograde. I thought i wasnt the targeted audience until u mentioned losing a loved one, i dont know what time frame you’re asking about exactly but these last 2-3 years been crazy, i lost friendships that shaped me and losing them changed me, been feeling stuck in the same place, having troubles with continuing my education, and just recently my dad passed away. My dream is to live a stable life in the future, financially and physically, to have many real and genuine good connections friendships and relationships bc i seem to lack them, my walls are always up, and most importantly freedom. I feel like all the lessons i attracted was about staying alert if that makes sense, expect the unexpected and never fully trust the situation, if you’re asking about the ppl i attract i genuinely am SICK of how much i attract pisces placements, especially moons and mars, also cancer mars idk what is it with water and fire placements ive been noticing a pattern lol i wish i understood why, personality wise i would say i attract people that don’t know what tf they want or act like they’re sure of themselves when they’re not, just insecure actions in general
Venus in Virgo 4th h, Gemini north node, Saturn in 6th h. Have been going through it and not much is going well

I’m a Taurus rising 🙋🏾‍♀️Aquarius Venus in 10H, north node in Virgo, Saturn in Aries 12H. Dream: more security with immigration, income and stability. I’ve been attracting people who underestimate me, belittle me or condescend to me because of the situation I’ve been in.

Ah my relationship is going through it, but having a kid together makes it extra complicated and hard to figure out the next steps. also out of work for the summer, and finances are stressful right now. in the middle of apartment deep cleaning and reorganization. As for dreams, I am dreaming of peace in my heart, hope, lush and beautiful open spaces. I have a surgery coming up, and I hope it will make exercise easier, because I'm craving physical strength and more confidence. I attract fellow feelers & thinkers. I get messages through books and walks. I have Venus in Aries in my 12th house, Saturn in Cap in 9th, and North Node in Aquarius in 10th.

Taurus rising, Pisces Venus (11th), Saturn in Aries and north node in Virgo. And uh..I have a lot of interests. 😅 But ultimately I want the work I do to give back to the world in a way that supports sustainable change and helps us all work better together; some of that is through doing a lot of research and social engagement. But a lesson I learned is consistency: with the work I’m doing and for my health too. And finding time to enjoy doing artistic things. Getting back into that while juggling work.

Venus and Saturn in Aries in my 12th house and my north node in Virgo in the 6th house. Got an office job last August after bartending for 5 years, lost essentially all of my close friends, I’ve been struggling financially since getting this new job, and it feels like everything has gone to shit over the past year

Taurus rising going through a 12 year relationship splitting up, starting therapy to process childhood trauma, realizing how codependent I am and having an identity crisis - venus is 10h Aquarius. North node is 7h Scorpio. Saturn is 11h Pisces. Dream is stability. If I’m doing big unrealistic dreams, travel and leisure and being able to spoil my friends.

I’m 12th house Venus and north node and 3rd house Saturn…. I’ve never been in a relationship im 21 and anytime I’m close I just pull away I have a lot of identity issues lol. I think I attract a lot of opportunities to speak my mind or to be myself and I can’t I’m a huge people pleaser. My dream is to be admired for something I’ve done, Im just cliche like that LOL

Venus 2nd house in Gemini, NN 4th house in Leo, Saturn 1st house Taurus 😅 - my dream for a while has been to move abroad and live a nomadic lifestyle where I work for myself which I’m now finally doing after being let go from my job a couple weeks ago. This year specifically I’ve attracted a lot of hidden enemies but I also have a 12th house stellium so that’s always been a constant
I would love to know what taurus risings are in vedic astrology
Venus in Pisces, 10th house. Saturn in Pisces, 10th house. North Node in Scorpio, 7th house.
